_comment: Multi-turn refinement cues — decides if a question is a follow-up edit of the prior turn (route to RefineAsync) vs a fresh query. Externalized 2026-06-02 from RefinementDetector.cs so cues are tunable + multilingual without recompiling. Per-locale: leadingConnectors (matched as prefix / StartsWith on the lowercased question), anaphora + phrases (matched as substring / Contains). shortFollowUpMaxWords is the language-agnostic 'short reply ⇒ likely a refinement' threshold. The 'en' set is byte-identical to the in-code fallback; behavior is unchanged for English until an operator edits this file. To add a language, append a locale block. Behavior contract: file ABSENT → in-code English fallback; PRESENT → this drives detection.
